subcodes.first_line: O Lord! I beseech Thee by the revelations of Thy Most Great Name unto the nations and by the lights of Thy countenance, O Ancient of Days, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب اسئلک بتجلیات اسمک الاعظم علی الامم و بانوار وجهک یا مالک القدم بان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection
